rationale: The cited paper appears as a single example in the discussion of prior work on social cognition in interpersonal persuasion, specifically word-of-mouth recommendations. In the citing paper, it is used to illustrate background context rather than to build the study design, measures, hypotheses, or analytical approach. The core contribution and empirical strategy (Neurosynth topic decoding of ad-viewing fMRI data) do not depend on this specific source. Thus, the citation functions as contextual prior-literature mention rather than a substantive building block.
